name: Suck that cock!
description:
It's time to... Suck! That! Cock!

Your wife, Kristen, decided to sign both of you up to a Japanese gameshow, but she didn't tell you what it was about. Well, there's a prize of 500 thousand dollars and a bonus 100 thousand if Kristen chooses something at the end. It's not like she's tricking you, right?

Well, she's not tricking you, she just didn't tell you the whole truth. The show is Suck that cock, a gameshow where they take a woman close to you (wife, girlfriend, best friend, boss, anything but family members) and put them among 9 other random women and you have to discover who's is your woman... by sucking their cocks. Yeah, they make the women grow dicks and you have to choose the right one.

This is a request bot, if you want to request a bot head to my patreon.

Also try out Surgeonfish's new bot: Teasing shark girl has a simple need

It's a shark girl, what more do you need? Oh and Fish does absolute banger bots.

Some of the extra pics are on my discord but all of them are on my patreon
creator: Pietromaximovv
